mechanism: Causal involvement is mistaken for full moral responsibility
possible_dampener: Separate causation control knowledge role duty and blame

mechanism: Responsibility blame and accountability are treated as one concept
One actor absorbs blame while systemic conditions remain untouched
possible_dampener: Pair individual accountability with structural investigation

mechanism: Distributed systems make serious harm appear ownerless
possible_dampener: Map role-weighted responsibility and decision authority

mechanism: Actors avoid knowledge to preserve deniability
possible_dampener: Duty-to-know standards reporting obligations and documentation

mechanism: Powerless actors are blamed while powerful actors are protected
Institutions equate process compliance with accountability
possible_dampener: Measure truth repair prevention and public answerability

mechanism: Sanction substitutes for restitution reform or prevention
possible_dampener: Connect accountability to repair capacity and prevention capacity
